_comment: Primally Pure 'Three-Place Tour' multi-world product tour — THE WORKED EXAMPLE (clients/Primally pure/ad-runs/run-03-run-03, finals/master-v2.mp4). Copy to config.json and edit. Three scent worlds, each = a WIDE kinetic-calm ARRIVAL clip (bottle small, environment dominates) + a top-down MACRO product MOMENT clip. Six Higgsfield Marketing Studio product_showcase clips grounded on imported product UUIDs, an NB2 text-free flat-lay end-card BACKGROUND + an HTML/Playwright text overlay, one ElevenLabs music bed. Silent otherwise (no VO, no captions in scenes). FFmpeg trims to the grid + hard-cut concats + muxes music. 720x1280 9:16, 27.0s. SEALED-BOTTLE is a hard safety rule.
visual_style: Sunlit-natural / handmade / farm-to-skin. Soft daylight from upper-left, faint contact shadows, linen + clay + cedar. Camera language KINETIC-CALM (slow drift, lateral track, soft push) — NOT whip-pan/fast-dolly. Each scent gets its own color world; bottles are NOT color-coded so world palette + botanical companion carry scent identity.

higgsfield.safety_block: No bare skin, no exposed body parts in frame. NO smoke, NO vapor, NO aerosol, NO atomizer spray, NO scent visualization — bottle is a sealed twist-stick deodorant, never depict it open, extruded, or spraying. NO whip pans, NO shake, NO wobble, NO earthquake. Label identical to imported product reference. No on-screen text.

worlds.world: Private sunrise reformer pilates studio — sheer linen curtains diffusing mauve-pink dawn light, blonde-pine floor, one wood reformer with cream-strap loops, folded cream linen towel on the carriage edge.
worlds.palette: Mauve dawn + cream linen + blonde pine
worlds.arrival_prompt: 9:16 KINETIC-CALM WIDE inside a sunrise reformer pilates studio for Primally Pure Lavender Deodorant. Bottle stays small; environment dominates, never macro. Sheer linen curtains diffusing mauve-pink dawn light, blonde-pine floor, one wood reformer with cream-strap loops, a folded cream linen towel on the carriage edge. The cream-colored sealed Lavender Deo + a fresh lavender sprig rest on the towel. The toe of a cream canvas sneaker visible at the very lower edge of frame implies a recent presence. 3 ambient-not-frenetic cuts: slow drift past the linen curtain catching mauve light; lateral track past the reformer past the bottle; soft push-in to the towel at medium scale. Sunlit-natural palette: mauve dawn + cream linen + blonde pine. Soft daylight from upper-left.
worlds.macro_prompt: 9:16 top-down macro product-only shot for Primally Pure Lavender Deodorant. Cream-colored sealed Lavender Deo lies horizontally nested into a folded cream linen towel on a pale-pine surface, fresh lavender sprig draped across the cap, small unglazed clay bud vase to the side. Slow parallax tilt revealing more of the linen weave. Soft mauve-warm daylight from upper-left, faint contact shadow. Cream + mauve + blonde pine palette. NO hands in frame.

worlds.world: Spa / sauna threshold anteroom — vertical cedar slat wall, dark sage-teal slate floor, fresh eucalyptus bundle hanging from a leather loop, low slate bench in foreground, faint soft steam drifting laterally in the back.
worlds.arrival_prompt: 9:16 KINETIC-CALM WIDE spa anteroom for Primally Pure Blue Tansy Deodorant. BOTTLE STAYS SEALED, CAP STAYS ON. Bottle stays small; environment dominates, never macro. Vertical cedar slat wall, dark sage-teal slate floor, fresh bundle of eucalyptus hanging from a leather loop on the wall, low slate bench in foreground. Cream-colored sealed Blue Tansy Deo sits on the bench next to a cracked-glaze sage-blue ceramic bowl holding small blue tansy flowers. Faint soft steam drifting laterally in the back, NOT billowing. Bare ankle in cream linen robe just visible at upper-right edge, no face. 3 ambient cuts: lateral track from hanging eucalyptus down past wall; soft tracking past bench catching bottle and bowl; gentle push-in at medium scale. Sage-teal + bone + warm cedar palette. Soft cool daylight from upper-right.
worlds.macro_prompt: 9:16 top-down macro product-only shot for Primally Pure Blue Tansy Deodorant. Cream-colored sealed Blue Tansy Deo rests horizontally on a large cracked-glaze sage-blue ceramic dish on smooth slate stone surface. Two small blue tansy flowers + two fresh eucalyptus leaves arranged loose around it. Cool sage-teal + bone palette, soft cool daylight from upper-left. Slow parallax tilt. NO hands in frame.
worlds._note: Arrival re-rolled once (S03 v1 → v2): v1 rendered the bottle with the cap removed — violated the sealed-bottle safety rule. v2 front-loads 'BOTTLE STAYS SEALED, CAP STAYS ON'.

worlds.world: Outdoor Saturday farmers market stall — cream linen-canvas market tent overhead with dappled morning sunlight, wooden crates of yellow bergamot fruit and sage stems, cream open-weave linen tote bag on a weathered wood crate.
worlds.arrival_prompt: 9:16 KINETIC-CALM WIDE outdoor Saturday farmers market for Primally Pure Bergamot + Eucalyptus Deodorant. Bottle stays small; environment dominates, never macro. Cream linen-canvas market tent overhead with dappled morning sunlight breaking through, wooden crates of yellow bergamot fruit and sage stems in foreground, cream open-weave linen tote bag set on weathered wood crate. The matte-black sealed B+E Deo pokes out of the tote alongside three long fresh eucalyptus stems. Bare hand at lower edge reaching to pick a bergamot fruit (only fingers, no face). 3 ambient cuts (slightly more energy to mirror the brighter morning palette, still NO whip pans): slow push past canvas tent catching dappled light; lateral track past crates landing on tote; soft push-in to bottle at medium scale. Citrus yellow + warm linen + sage palette. Crisp contact shadows.
worlds.macro_prompt: 9:16 top-down macro product-only shot for Primally Pure Bergamot + Eucalyptus Deodorant. Matte-black sealed B+E Deo rests horizontally on cream linen napkin on pale wood farmhouse table. Halved bergamot fruit (cut face up showing citrus pulp) + one long fresh eucalyptus stem with leaves arranged loose around the bottle. Bright warm morning daylight from upper-left, faint contact shadow. Cream linen + citrus yellow + sage palette. Slow parallax tilt. NO hands in frame.
worlds._note: Arrival's mid-clip frame showed a gloved leather hand (storyboard called for bare fingertips) — minor deviation, accepted. Macro (S06) label misrendered 'Eucalyptus'→'Eucaiyptus' at the upright extreme; not visible in the top-down portion the trim dominates.

end_card.nb2_prompt: Editorial top-down flat-lay product photograph of three Primally Pure deodorant bottles arranged casually on a soft warm cream-blush gradient background. Bottle 1 (cream-beige cylindrical twist-stick, identical to the Lavender reference) tilted at a 15-degree angle in the upper-right with a small fresh lavender sprig laid beside its base. Bottle 2 (cream-beige cylindrical twist-stick, identical to the Blue Tansy reference) standing upright in the center foreground with two small blue tansy flowers and a single fresh eucalyptus leaf laid beside its base. Bottle 3 (matte-black cylindrical twist-stick, identical to the Bergamot + Eucalyptus reference) tilted at a 15-degree angle in the lower-left with a sprig of fresh eucalyptus and one halved bergamot fruit (cut face up) laid beside its base. The three bottles overlap slightly but each is clearly visible, with soft diffused shadows pooling beneath them on the cream-blush surface. All three bottles have identical Primally Pure black thin-serif labels exactly matching the imported product references. Pinterest-style editorial product photography, soft natural overhead daylight, clean and uncluttered farm-to-skin sunlit-natural register, generous negative space at the top of the frame. No text overlays, no typography, no captions, no logos other than what is printed on the bottles.

overlay.headline: FIND YOUR DAILY.
overlay.wordmark: PRIMALLY / PURE (Playfair Display serif, two rows)
overlay.text_compositing_rule: Headline + labels + arrows + wordmark composited via HTML/Playwright/ffmpeg, NEVER AI-rendered. NB2 generates the flat-lay BACKGROUND ONLY (no text).

music.prompt: Warm acoustic-pop / dreamy-indie instrumental bed, calm and aspirational, soft guitar + gentle percussion + warm bass, major key, wellness-ritual register (NOT jingle, NOT neon pop-house), instrumental only, energetic-but-gentle from t=0.

end_card.note: HTML 'FIND YOUR DAILY.' end card, default on
